check.name: Check
check.description: Checkmark for confirming selection or successful completion

close.name: Close
close.description: Close or dismiss a surface, dialog, or tag

plus.name: Plus
plus.description: Add a new item or expand a section

minus.name: Minus
minus.description: Remove an item or collapse a section

trash.name: Trash
trash.description: Permanently delete an item or clear a selection

search.name: Search
search.description: Open a search interface or indicate a search input

filter.name: Filter
filter.description: Apply or indicate active filters on a data set

arrow-up.name: Arrow Up
arrow-up.description: Navigate upward or indicate ascending sort order

arrow-down.name: Arrow Down
arrow-down.description: Navigate downward or indicate descending sort order

arrow-left.name: Arrow Left
arrow-left.description: Navigate back or to the previous item

arrow-right.name: Arrow Right
arrow-right.description: Navigate forward or to the next item

chevron-down.name: Chevron Down
chevron-down.description: Indicate an expandable section or open dropdown

menu.name: Menu
menu.description: Open the navigation menu or sidebar

home.name: Home
home.description: Navigate to the home or root page

info.name: Info
info.description: Indicate informational content or an information tooltip

warning.name: Warning
warning.description: Indicate a warning or potentially destructive condition

error-circle.name: Error Circle
error-circle.description: Indicate an error or failed state

check-circle.name: Check Circle
check-circle.description: Indicate a successful or valid state

spinner.name: Spinner
spinner.description: Indicate a loading or in-progress state

external-link.name: External Link
external-link.description: Indicate a link that opens in a new tab or external site

download.name: Download
download.description: Download a file or export data

upload.name: Upload
upload.description: Upload a file or import data

checkbox-checked.name: Checkbox Checked
checkbox-checked.description: Visual indicator for a checked checkbox state

radio-selected.name: Radio Selected
radio-selected.description: Visual indicator for a selected radio button

eye.name: Eye
eye.description: Toggle visibility of sensitive content such as passwords

eye-off.name: Eye Off
eye-off.description: Indicate that sensitive content is currently hidden

mail.name: Mail
mail.description: Represent email or a mail-related action

bell.name: Bell
bell.description: Represent notifications or a notification preference

chat.name: Chat
chat.description: Open a chat or messaging interface
